heading: Foreign tax credit allowed to shareholders
label: 853 Foreign tax credit allowed to shareholders
notes: Amendments2010—Subsec. (c). , substituted “Statements” for “Notice” in heading.Pub. L. 111–325, § 301(c)(1)(B), which directed amendment by substituting “so reported by the company in a written statement furnished to such shareholder” for “so designated by the company in a written notice mailed to its shareholders not later than 60 days after the close of the taxable year”, was executed by making the substitution for “so designated by the company in a written notice mailed to its shareholders not later than 60 days after the close of its taxable year” in concluding provisions to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 111–325, § 301(c)(1)(A)Subsec. (d). , struck out “and notifying shareholders” after “election” in heading and “and the notice to shareholders required by subsection (c)” after “subsection (a)” in text.Pub. L. 111–325, § 301(c)(2)2005—Subsec. (e). amended heading and text of subsec. (e) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “This section shall not apply to any tax with respect to which the regulated investment company is not allowed a credit under section 901 by reason of section 901(k).”Pub. L. 109–1351998—Subsec. (c). , struck out at end “Such notice shall also include the amount of such taxes which (without regard to the election under this section) would not be allowable as a credit under section 901(a) to the regulated investment company by reason of section 901(k).”Pub. L. 105–206, § 6010(k)(2)Subsecs. (e), (f). , added subsec. (e) and redesignated former subsec. (e) as (f).Pub. L. 105–206, § 6010(k)(1)1997—Subsec. (c). inserted at end “Such notice shall also include the amount of such taxes which (without regard to the election under this section) would not be allowable as a credit under section 901(a) to the regulated investment company by reason of section 901(k).”Pub. L. 105–341986—Subsec. (c). substituted “60 days” for “45 days”.Pub. L. 99–5141976—Subsec. (d). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–4551964—Subsec. (c). substituted “45 days” for “30 days”.Pub. L. 88–272

children.text: more than 50 percent of the value (as defined in section 851(c)(4)) of whose total assets at the close of the taxable year consists of stock or securities in foreign corporations, and
which meets the requirements of section 852(a) for the taxable year,

children.label: A
children.text: shall not, with respect to such taxable year, be allowed a deduction under section 164(a) or a credit under section 901 for taxes to which subsection (a) is applicable, and

children.label: B
children.text: shall be allowed as an addition to the dividends paid deduction for such taxable year the amount of such taxes;

children.label: A
children.text: include in gross income and treat as paid by him his proportionate share of such taxes, and

children.label: B
children.text: treat as gross income from sources within the respective foreign countries and possessions of the United States, for purposes of applying subpart A of part III of subchapter N, the sum of his proportionate share of such taxes and the portion of any dividend paid by such investment company which represents income derived from sources within foreign countries or possessions of the United States.
taxes paid to any foreign country or possession of the United States, and
gross income derived from sources within any foreign country or possession of the United States,

children.heading: Manner of making election
children.label: d Manner of making election
children.text: The election provided in subsection (a) shall be made in such manner as the Secretary may prescribe by regulations.

children.heading: Treatment of certain taxes not allowed as a credit under section 901
children.label: e Treatment of certain taxes not allowed as a credit under section 901
children.text: This section shall not apply to any tax with respect to which the regulated investment company is not allowed a credit under section 901 by reason of subsection (k) or () of such section.l
For treatment by shareholders of taxes paid to foreign countries and possessions of the United States, see section 164(a) and section 901.
For definition of foreign corporation, see section 7701(a)(5).
